chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-3254 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For Katcha Peshi. 09.11.2017. Mr. Ashfaque Ahmed Lanjar, Advocate for petitioners alongwith petitioners. Mr. Ali Abbas Memon, State Counsel alongwith SIP/I.O Irshad Ali Khoso, P.S Airport, Sukkur The I.O of the subject F.I.R. placing on record the statement of petitioner No.1 Mst. Naila denying the incident of her abduction as narrated in the subject F.I.R. states that he will submit final report according to the statement of the alleged abductee before the concerned Court. He further undertakes that the police will provide protection to the petitioners against the private respondents on their approach to them. In the wake of such statement, learned Counsel for the petitioners expresses his satisfaction and seeks disposal of the petition. Accordingly, the petition is disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
